services.title: Services
services.subtitle: A personalized approach for each client on the journey to better health

weightLoss.title: Weight Loss Program
weightLoss.desc: Personalized weight loss diet programs. We ensure you reach your goal without starving or exercising, using a purely science-based approach. We accelerate your metabolism with the principle 'Our enemy is not fat, but sugar'.

weightGain.title: Weight Gain
weightGain.desc: Specially tailored healthy weight gain and nutrition plans for those who want to bulk up. We help you reach your ideal weight by increasing muscle and healthy fat mass without harmful foods.

antiAging.title: Anti-Aging & Nutrition
antiAging.desc: Special anti-aging nutrition advice and expert guidance in the field of nutrition. A cell-renewing nutrition program that improves skin health and rejuvenates the body.

consultation.title: Healthy Nutrition
consultation.desc: Correction of daily eating habits, water intake planning, and detailed advice for a healthy lifestyle. From the first meeting, your body's needs are fully analyzed.

detox.title: Detox Program
detox.desc: Cleansing the body of harmful toxins, rejuvenating the body with special detox tea and nutrition. A 7-day effective cleansing and energy recovery based on Swiss experience.

media.title: IV Therapy
media.desc: Intravenous (IV) therapy is the most effective way to deliver nutrients, vitamins, and minerals directly to body tissues via infusion. It boosts energy and strengthens immunity.

about.title: About
about.shortBio: Leyla Zulfuqarli – Professional dietitian with 15+ years of experience, author of the first diet books in Azerbaijan. With appearances on TV channels like AzTV, Xazar TV, Show TV, ITV and ARB, international detox programs (Switzerland, Germany), and over 12000 satisfied clients, she makes a real difference in healthy eating.
about.bio1: With over 15 years of experience as a professional dietitian, Leyla Zulfuqarli has created personalized, science-based nutrition plans for more than 12000 clients, transforming their lives. She studied Medical Biology at the Medical University and later worked as a surgical assistant. Driven by a desire to help people more effectively, she continued her education in dietology in Ukraine in 2010, and later specialized in 'Nutrition and Dietetics' at Istanbul Medipol University in 2012.
about.bio2: Leyla Zulfuqarli's expertise extends beyond Azerbaijan; she has worked in countries like Germany, Switzerland, Turkey, Slovakia, the UK, and France. Notably, she organized special 7-day detox and weight loss programs for Azerbaijanis in Switzerland, enhancing both physical and mental well-being.
about.bio3: Recognized as the author of the first diet books in Azerbaijan, Leyla is the creator of two successful books: 'Eat Healthy, Lose Weight' and 'The Secret of Obesity, The Key to Weight Loss'. Her articles on healthy eating have been published multiple times in both local and Turkish newspapers. Furthermore, she has shared her secrets to healthy nutrition with thousands by appearing on numerous prominent TV channels including AzTV, Xazar TV, Show TV, ITV, ARB and Lider TV.
about.bio4: Operating on the principle that 'Our enemy is not fat, but sugar', Leyla helps both those looking to lose weight without exercise and those wanting to gain weight through a customized approach. She regularly shares educational videos on her YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram channels. Every person who consults her leaves highly satisfied and healthier.
about.missionText1: Knowing that everyone is different, preparing a unique nutrition plan for everyone. To live a healthy life, food should be a pleasure, a lifestyle — not a restriction.
about.missionText2: Elevating not just my client's weight, but their health, energy levels, and quality of life — this is my goal.
about.servicesTitle: What I do for my clients?
servicesList: Personalized diet programs for weight loss (without exercise)
Healthy weight gain plans for those looking to bulk up
Healthy nutrition consultation and water intake planning
Anti-aging — expert advice in the field of nutrition
Body cleansing with detox programs and detox tea
Seminars, events, media, and TV appearances
certsList: Istanbul Medipol University - Nutrition and Dietetics
about.socialDesc: I share useful tips, live broadcasts and health secrets on social networks

items.name: Murad Arif (Composer, Producer)
items.text: Thanks to Leyla's personalized program, I lost exactly 30 kg in just 3 months! Most importantly, I achieved this result healthily without any surgery and I'm maintaining my weight.

items.name: Nermine
items.text: I suffered from obesity for 9-10 years. I could no longer walk and struggled a lot. I tried many places but got no results. Thanks to Leyla's personalized program, I lost exactly 30 kg in 4 months! I feel so light now.

items.name: Gunay
items.text: I am so happy because this was my first diet and I lost 7 kilos in 1 month. Since I have Hashimoto's disease, I could only lose 1-2 kilos at most before. But thanks to Leyla's special approach, I achieved this success!

items.name: Ravane (54 years old)
items.text: I was very hopeless when starting the program. For 2 years, I did very strict sugar-free, carb-free diets and sports, but couldn't even lose 1 kg. I also suffered from severe allergies and itching. But 1 month later, the itching decreased, I lost 10 kilos, and 20 cm of fat broke down!

items.a: Consultations take place both online (video call) and in person. In the first session, your health status, goals and lifestyle are analyzed.

items.q: How soon will I see results?
items.a: Results begin to appear within the first 2 weeks. On average, a healthy weight loss of 3-5 kg per month is achievable. Results vary by individual goals.
Yes, every plan is completely customized based on your age, weight, health status, food preferences and lifestyle.

items.q: Is it possible to lose weight without exercise?
items.a: Yes. Leyla's methodology is built around exercise-free weight loss. With the right nutrition plan, effective results are possible without workouts.

items.q: Where can I buy the book?
items.a: "The Secret of Weight — The Key to Slimness" is available to order via WhatsApp, and also on BakuBookCenter and Alinino.az.

book.title1: The Secret of Obesity - The Key to Weight Loss
book.author: Leyla Zulfuqarli
book.description1: Based on my years of experience and scientific research, this book reveals the most important secrets of losing weight and having a healthy body. How to lose weight without exercise or starving? The answer is in this book.
book.description2: One of Leyla Zulfuqarli's first and most famous books. Practical tips on the core principles of healthy eating, body rejuvenation, and maintaining your shape for life.
book.detoxDesc: Get 'The Secret of Obesity - The Key to Weight Loss' book along with a special detox tea. This package is the ideal solution to cleanse the body and speed up the weight loss process.
